TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tbulan, title = Tbulan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tbulan} }

S.FORM: Tbulan Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Tbulan a niyaro', 291 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 693 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 358 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 335 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal44%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Cou1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tb~b~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u tb~b~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tbulan Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Tbulan a niyaro', 291 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 693 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 358 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 335 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal44%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Cou1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tb~b~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u tb~b~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
